project.name: RankPilot
project.description: AI-first SEO/marketing SaaS with voice agent, lead gen, creative assembly, and mobile-first UI (Next.js 15 + TypeScript 5.7 + Firebase).

ai.client: unified aiClient with OpenAI primary, Gemini fallback, static last resort

codeGenPolicies.format: Respect existing; do not reformat untouched files

goals: Validate Twilio signatures when not in test mode
Tag all logs with callId and tenantId when available
Degrade gracefully if Twilio env is missing (503)
Implement getAvailability, holdSlot, createAppointment, sendConfirmation behind RBAC
Use Firestore transactions for slot hold/commit
Emit audit logs for booking operations
Robots-aware crawling
Email/phone normalization + verification
Consent tagging + DNC check before outreach
Deterministic dedupe via SHA256 over sorted inputs
Assemble creatives from approved contentUnits
No ratios stored; compute in UI
Locale + jurisdiction guards
Mobile-first layouts
Speculation Rules + link prefetch
Hero image fetchpriority high; skeletons not spinners
Create shared invoice upsert util to unify finance invoice upsert across endpoints
Ensure idempotent write of invoices and add contract tests
Implement Phase 2: optional test run flag (DELEGATION_RUN_TESTS=1)
Add timeout (30m) and pass/fail logging
Emit delegation metrics
Add circuit breaker and capability metrics dashboards
Broaden provider ordering and capability tests
Expose provider metrics via /api/health
Replace mock metrics with live data using /api/finance/metrics
Respect allowFinanceMocks() feature flag
Wire real usage and payment method metrics from Stripe and Firestore
Remove placeholder FIN-02 fields and add tests
Gate stub AI util behind feature flag
Wire to real AI orchestrator or add provenance notes when stub used
Verify imports removed and delete stub file; replace with enhanced-card.tsx or Tailwind primitives
Replace simplistic Progress stub with proper progress component or Tailwind primitive
Schedule deletion after 2025-08-22 and note removal in CHANGE_LOG
Keep integration hub gated by feature flag; add Playwright tests for admin vs non-admin access
Prepare code for eventual real integrations while retaining mocks
Add provenance headers; clearly annotate mock vs live behaviour
Ensure allowStreamingMockUser() gate returns 401 when disabled
Finalize team-aware rate limiting (token or leaky bucket)
Implement multi-factor authentication checks for sensitive endpoints
Expose KPIs (rateLimitRejectionRate, provenance coverage) via /api/health
Add sustained adoption CI guard for NeuroSEO prune
Implement dry-run report before destructive pruning

banned: Introducing new AI entrypoints outside approved features
Using raw hex colors instead of design tokens

implementations: Implement transactional slot hold with TTL and commit-on-confirm.
Create Next.js API route validating Twilio signature and emitting callId.
Build creative assembler selecting top-quality contentUnits deterministically.
Add Cloud Task queue for outbound pacing with tenant gates.
Create shared invoice upsert utility for Stripe webhook and seeding endpoints; ensure idempotent updates and add contract test.
Implement Phase 2 for delegation: optional test run flag (DELEGATION_RUN_TESTS=1), 30m timeout and pass/fail logging in script.
Replace Finance mocks: wire pages to real /api/finance/metrics, respect allowFinanceMocks() flag.
Add circuit breaker and capability metrics to AI provider adapter; extend tests.
Add emulator tests and backoff logic for scheduled runner; consider Cloud Tasks.
Wire billing page to real usage and payment data; remove placeholder FIN-02 fields.
Gate Insights page fallback or integrate with AI orchestrator; add provenance notes.
Delete adoption-gate workflow after 2025-08-22; add sustained adoption guard to CI for NeuroSEO prune.
Remove UI stub files and replace progress stub; verify imports are removed.
Convert marketing backlog tasks T18–T24 into tracked issues with acceptance criteria.
Wire Enterprise dashboard to real KPIs; respect allowEnterpriseMocks() flag; add tests.
Keep integration hub gating (feature + admin); add Playwright tests verifying access.
Add provenance headers and gating to streaming API and chat; update docs.
Finalize team-aware rate limiting and MFA checks; expose KPIs via /api/health.
Add sustained adoption CI guard for NeuroSEO prune and implement dry-run reporting.
refactors: Convert heavy components to client islands via dynamic import (ssr:false).
Subset and self-host fonts; wire display:swap.
Replace placeholder custom dashboard sources with real queries or gate behind flag.
Remove page-backup.tsx and team page-fixed.tsx when unused.
tests: Collision test: two holds on same slot must yield one success.
DST edge: booking across DST change commits correct tz.
Test idempotent invoice upsert via Stripe webhook and seeding endpoints.
Delegation test: verify optional test run logs pass/fail; enforce 30m timeout.
Finance mocks test: confirm metrics hidden when allowFinanceMocks() false; visible when true.
AI adapter tests: verify circuit breaker triggers and metrics recorded.
Scheduled runner tests: ensure due automation tasks run correctly; verify backoff behaviour.
Enterprise dashboard gating test: ensure real metrics load when mocks disabled; mock values hidden when enabled.
Integration hub access test: verify only admins with feature flag see content; others get restricted message.
Streaming API test: verify 401 returned when allowStreamingMockUser() disabled; check provenance headers on successful responses.
Rate limiter test: ensure team-aware limiter caps requests; verify MFA gating on sensitive actions.
Adoption prune guard test: ensure CI fails if adoption <95%; verify dry-run produces report.

checks.name: no-derived-ratios
checks.message: Do not store derived ratios in Firestore; compute in UI.

checks.name: no-client-writes-to-protected
checks.message: Client cannot write to protected collections; use server routes/functions.

checks.name: twilio-secret-not-in-client
checks.message: Twilio secrets must not appear in client bundles.
